BasicAttackSweepingEdge.name: Basic Attack: Sweeping Edge

desc.0: Press <IconNormal /> to activate:
desc.1: Performs up to five attacks against enemies ahead, dealing <ct color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</ct>.
desc.2: After landing the fifth hit's downward attack, and with sufficient <ct color=#FFFFFF>Trial by Cold</ct>, keep holding <IconSpecial /> or <IconNormal /> to chain into <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Execution - Merciless Judgment</ct>.
desc.3: Enters the <ct color=#FFFFFF>Bound Absolution</ct> state after throwing the cape during the fourth hit.

params: Cloak Slash DMG Per Second Multiplier

desc.0: Hold <IconNormal /> to activate:
desc.1: Promeia leaps into the air and attacks, throwing her cape beside the enemy and entering the <ct color=#FFFFFF>Bound Absolution</ct> state, dealing <ct color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</ct>.
desc.2: Hitting enemies does not accumulate <ct color=#FFFFFF>Corrosive Chill</ct>.

desc.0: When using certain skills, Promeia throws her cape to continuously slice enemies, dealing <ct color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</ct>. Does not accumulate <ct color=#FFFFFF>Corrosive Chill</ct> upon hit.
desc.1: While the cape remains out, Promeia can walk slowly.
desc.2: Press <IconNormal /> or <IconSpecial /> during this period to immediately follow up with the 5th hit of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Sweeping Edge</ct>.
desc.3: If attacked during this period, Promeia triggers a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Perfect Dodge</ct> automatically. The dodge can trigger once every 20s.

desc.0: Press <IconEvade /> to activate:
desc.1: A quick dash dodge.
desc.2: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: Press <IconNormal /> during a dodge to activate:
desc.1: Delivers a quick attack forward, dealing <ct color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</ct>.

desc.0: Press <IconNormal /> during a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Perfect Dodge</ct> to activate:
desc.1: Unleashes consecutive attacks against the target, dealing <ct color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</ct>.
desc.2: After using this skill, it can be immediately followed up with the 5th hit of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Sweeping Edge</ct>.
desc.3: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: Press <IconSpecial /> to activate:
desc.1: Launches a flying blade attack, dealing <ct color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</ct>.

EXSpecialAttackExecutionGlacialDeath.name: EX Special Attack: Execution - Glacial Death

desc.0: With enough Energy, press <IconSpecialReady /> to activate:
desc.1: Performs a flying blade attack, throwing her cape beside the enemy and entering the <ct color=#FFFFFF>Bound Absolution</ct> state, dealing <ct color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</ct>.
desc.2: If attacked by an enemy shortly after using the move, automatically chains into <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Execution - Shrouded in Shadow</ct>.
desc.3: Upon use, Promeia gains the <ct color=#FFFFFF>Absolute Order</ct> effect.
desc.4: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

EXSpecialAttackExecutionShroudedInShadow.name: EX Special Attack: Execution - Shrouded in Shadow

desc.0: Triggers automatically when hit shortly upon activating <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Execution - Glacial Death</ct>:
desc.1: Enters the <ct color=#FFFFFF>Vital View</ct> state briefly and swiftly circles behind the enemy.
desc.2: After triggering a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Perfect Dodge</ct>, and with enough Energy, press <IconSpecialReady /> to consume 40 Energy and activate <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Execution - Shrouded in Shadow</ct>, gaining the <ct color=#FFFFFF>Absolute Order</ct> effect.
desc.3: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: While under the <ct color=#FFFFFF>Absolute Order</ct> effect, press <IconNormal /> or <IconSpecial /> while in the <ct color=#FFFFFF>Bound Absolution</ct> state to activate:
desc.1: Leaps toward the enemy, retrieving the cape while performing a descending attack that deals <ct color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</ct>.
desc.2: After landing, if Promeia possesses <ct color=#FFFFFF>Trial by Cold</ct>, keep holding <IconNormal /> or <IconSpecial /> to chain into <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Execution - Merciless Judgment</ct>.
desc.3: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: After triggering <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Execution - Shrouded in Shadow</ct>, press <IconNormal /> or <IconSpecial /> to activate:
desc.1: Quickly launches a flurry of attacks, then leaps toward the enemy, retrieving the cape while performing a more powerful downward attack that deals <ct color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</ct>.
desc.2: After landing, if Promeia possesses <ct color=#FFFFFF>Trial by Cold</ct>, keep holding <IconNormal /> or <IconSpecial /> to chain into <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Execution - Merciless Judgment</ct>.
desc.3: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

EXSpecialAttackExecutionMercilessJudgmen.name: EX Special Attack: Execution - Merciless Judgment

desc.0: With enough <ct color=#FFFFFF>Trial by Cold</ct> and after performing the final hit of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Sweeping Edge</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack: Execution - Descending Frost</ct>, or <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack: Execution - Layered Frost</ct>, keep holding <IconNormal /> or <IconSpecial /> after landing to activate:
desc.1: Quickly leaps back while unleashing a more powerful finishing move, dealing <ct color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</ct>.
desc.2: Hitting enemies does not accumulate <ct color=#FFFFFF>Corrosive Chill</ct>.
desc.3: After using this skill, hold <IconNormal /> or <IconSpecial />, or press <IconNormal /> to immediately follow up with the 5th hit of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Sweeping Edge</ct>.
desc.4: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: When a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</ct> is triggered, select the character to activate:
desc.1: Throws flying blades and hangs upside down above the enemy, unleashing a flurry of attacks and ending with a finishing move, dealing massive <ct color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</ct>.
desc.2: When the heavy attack hits an enemy afflicted with <ct color=#98EFF0>Ice Anomaly</ct>, <ct color=#FE437E>Ether Anomaly</ct>, <ct color=#2EB6FF>Electric Anomaly</ct>, <ct color=#FF5521>Fire Anomaly</ct>, <ct color=#F0D12B>Physical Anomaly</ct>, or <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind Anomaly</ct>, it triggers <ct color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</ct> once, dealing 100% Attribute Anomaly DMG of the corresponding attribute.
desc.3: After using this skill, it can be immediately followed up with the 5th hit of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Sweeping Edge</ct>.
desc.4: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: When Decibel Rating is at <ct color=#FFFFFF>Maximum</ct>, press <IconUltimateReady /> to activate:
desc.1: Launches a series of forward attacks, dealing massive <ct color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</ct>.
desc.2: When the heavy attack hits an enemy afflicted with <ct color=#98EFF0>Ice Anomaly</ct>, <ct color=#FE437E>Ether Anomaly</ct>, <ct color=#2EB6FF>Electric Anomaly</ct>, <ct color=#FF5521>Fire Anomaly</ct>, <ct color=#F0D12B>Physical Anomaly</ct>, or <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind Anomaly</ct>, it triggers <ct color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</ct> once, dealing 250% Attribute Anomaly DMG of the corresponding attribute.
desc.3: After using this skill, it can be immediately followed up with the 5th hit of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Sweeping Edge</ct>.
desc.4: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: When the active character is launched, press <IconSwitch /> to activate:
desc.1: Unleashes consecutive attacks against the target, dealing <ct color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</ct>.
desc.2: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: When the on-field character is about to be attacked, press <IconSwitch /> to activate:
desc.1: Parries the enemy's attack, dealing massive Daze.
desc.2: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: Press <IconNormal /> after a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Defensive Assist</ct> to activate:
desc.1: Unleashes consecutive attacks against the target, dealing <ct color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</ct>.
desc.2: After using this skill, it can be immediately followed up with the 5th hit of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Sweeping Edge</ct>.
desc.3: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: If Promeia's initial Anomaly Mastery exceeds 150, each additional point increases her Anomaly Proficiency by 1.5 and increases the whole squad's <ct color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</ct> DMG by 0.35%.
desc.1: Promeia gains a set amount of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Corrosive Chill</ct> when her attacks hit enemies. When squad members trigger <ct color=#98EFF0>Freeze</ct>/<ct color=#FFFFFF>Disorder</ct>, when the enemy is inflicted with <ct color=#FFFFFF>Vortex</ct>, or when Promeia triggers <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Execution - Shrouded in Shadow</ct>, she gains an additional 5/5/5/10 <ct color=#FFFFFF>Corrosive Chill</ct>, up to a maximum of 100 <ct color=#FFFFFF>Corrosive Chill</ct>.
desc.2: When a squad member triggers and hits an enemy with <ct color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</ct>, Promeia gains an additional 15 <ct color=#FFFFFF>Corrosive Chill</ct>.
desc.3: When <ct color=#FFFFFF>Corrosive Chill</ct> reaches at least 50, 50 <ct color=#FFFFFF>Corrosive Chill</ct> is consumed and converted into 1 point of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Trial by Cold</ct>, up to a maximum of 2 points of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Trial by Cold</ct>.
desc.4: Upon entering the battlefield, Promeia gains 2 points of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Trial by Cold</ct>.
desc.5: When the finishing move of <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Execution - Merciless Judgment</ct> hits an enemy afflicted with <ct color=#98EFF0>Ice Anomaly</ct>, <ct color=#FE437E>Ether Anomaly</ct>, <ct color=#2EB6FF>Electric Anomaly</ct>, <ct color=#FF5521>Fire Anomaly</ct>, <ct color=#F0D12B>Physical Anomaly</ct>, or <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind Anomaly</ct>, it triggers <ct color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</ct> once, dealing <ct color=#2BAD00>330%</ct> Attribute Anomaly DMG of the corresponding attribute. The skill consumes 1 <ct color=#FFFFFF>Trial by Cold</ct> upon activation.
desc.6: When Promeia triggers and hits an enemy with <ct color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</ct>, she gains an additional 100 Decibels. This effect can trigger once every 0.5s. Using <ct color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate: Glaciating Impalement</ct> grants <ct color=#FFFFFF>Frost Oath</ct>. With <ct color=#FFFFFF>Frost Oath</ct>, after using <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Execution - Merciless Judgment</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack: Hanging Judgment</ct>, or <ct color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate: Glaciating Impalement</ct>, press or hold <IconSpecial /> to consume <ct color=#FFFFFF>Frost Oath</ct> and immediately follow up with <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack: Execution - Layered Frost</ct>. Only 1 stack of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Frost Oath</ct> can be held.

desc.0: If Promeia's initial Anomaly Mastery exceeds 150, each additional point increases her Anomaly Proficiency by 1.5 and increases the whole squad's <ct color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</ct> DMG by 0.35%.

The skill consumes 1 <ct color=#FFFFFF>Trial by Cold</ct> upon activation.

Only 1 stack of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Frost Oath</ct> can be held.

desc.0: When another character in your squad is an <ct color=#FFFFFF>Anomaly</ct> or <ct color=#FFFFFF>Support</ct> character:
desc.1: When using an <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</ct>, Promeia's <ct color=#98EFF0>Ice Anomaly Buildup Rate</ct> increases by 30% for 30s. Repeated triggers refresh the duration.
desc.2: When any squad member applies the <ct color=#98EFF0>Frostbite</ct> effect to an enemy, its duration is increased by 3s.
desc.3: When Promeia's <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</ct> hits an enemy, it inflicts <ct color=#FFFFFF>Presumption of Guilt</ct>. When any squad member triggers <ct color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</ct> on a target with <ct color=#FFFFFF>Presumption of Guilt</ct>, it ignores 40% of the target's DEF. <ct color=#FFFFFF>Presumption of Guilt</ct> lasts 30s, and repeated triggers refresh the duration.

1.name: Innocent Idealism
1.desc: When Promeia uses <ct color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate: Glaciating Impalement</ct>, she gains an additional effect: if <ct color=#FFFFFF>Trial by Cold</ct> points are not at maximum, gain 1 point of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Trial by Cold</ct>. This effect can trigger once after using <ct color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate: Glaciating Impalement</ct>. When any squad member triggers <ct color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</ct> on enemies with <ct color=#FFFFFF>Presumption of Guilt</ct>, it ignores an additional 20% DEF.

flavor.0: This is a chaotic, lawless land.
flavor.1: Roaring engines and swirling dust, steel clashing with flesh. Conflict and violence play out day and night.
flavor.2: An innocent child grips an equally innocent weapon, wandering the same lost red earth.
flavor.3: "Would you be willing to do your part for the peace here?"

2.name: Faltering Conviction
2.desc: Promeia's Anomaly Proficiency increases by 40. The multiplier of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</ct> triggered by consuming <ct color=#FFFFFF>Trial by Cold</ct> increases by 120%.

flavor.0: She became an exceptional Sweeper — swift, precise, and silent. Her targets were clear and countless: Ethereals, those infected with irreversible Corruption, those fated to turn into Ethereals... every kill marked by bloodshed and the echoes of their cries.
flavor.2: "This is a Sweeper's duty!" "Just think of it as... for the greater good, got it?" "Those people were going to die anyway." ...

3.name: Cruel Moonlight
3.desc: <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Dodge</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Assist</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack</ct>, and <ct color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</ct> Lv. +2

flavor.0: The truth is often carved out from an unremarkable accident.
flavor.1: "You think the Sweepers could get rich just by dealing with worthless Ethereals?"
flavor.2: "Gang wars are a guaranteed profit. If you're afraid of getting your hands dirty, the 'Black Wolf' is more than eager..."
flavor.3: Night fell soon after, earlier than anyone expected.
flavor.4: The Sweepers, Calydon, the gangs with names and those without... in this chaotic age, all seemed to vanish into the endless dark.

4.name: Ruthless Accusation
4.desc: When Promeia triggers <ct color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</ct>, she restores 5 <ct color=#FFFFFF>Corrosive Chill</ct>. This effect can trigger once every 0.5s.

flavor.0: An invitation arrived, summoning a moth to its judgment.
flavor.1: The right to choose, light, justice, and everything that made her "Promeia."
flavor.2: She put on the handcuffs and chose exile for herself.

5.name: The Dying Moth
5.desc: <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Dodge</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Assist</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack</ct>, and <ct color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</ct> Lv. +2

flavor.0: She buried herself in her work.
flavor.1: Investigations, interrogations, judgments... an endless list.
flavor.2: Her colleagues watched her with concern.
flavor.3: "How long are you going to keep this up...?"
flavor.4: "Until every last sin is atoned for... or until death takes me."

6.name: To Be Continued
6.desc: When Promeia consumes <ct color=#FFFFFF>Trial by Cold</ct> to trigger <ct color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</ct>, it triggers an additional special <ct color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</ct> effect, dealing Attribute Anomaly DMG of the corresponding attribute at a fixed 200% multiplier. 5 <ct color=#FFFFFF>Corrosive Chill</ct> and 100 Decibels are also restored. This effect can trigger at most once every 15s. In addition, Attribute Anomaly DMG and <ct color=#FFFFFF>Disorder</ct> DMG dealt by Promeia ignore 15% of enemies' All-Attribute RES.

flavor.0: The end didn't arrive as expected, and the night wasn't as dark as imagined.
flavor.1: Colleagues, old acquaintances, late-night lights, and new friends...
flavor.2: The poor moth still couldn't shake off these heavy gifts, and that long-awaited ending now felt even further away.
flavor.3: But maybe... such a fate isn't so bad.
